briefdescription.para: This macro reads a value from a HDCP22 RNG register.

detaileddescription.para: A 32 bit read is performed. If the component is implemented in a smaller width, only the least significant data is read from the register. The most significant data will be read as 0.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the HDCP22 RNG core instance.
is the register offset of the register (defined at the top of this file).

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u32 XHdcp22Rng_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset)

briefdescription.para: This macro writes a value to a HDCP22 RNG register.

detaileddescription.para: A 32 bit write is performed. If the component is implemented in a smaller width, only the least significant data is written.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the HDCP22 RNG core instance.
is the register offset of the register (defined at the top of this file) to be written.
is the 32-bit value to write into the register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XHdcp22Rng_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)

briefdescription.para: This macro reads the status register from the HDCP22 RNG.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the HDCP22 RNG core instance.

simplesect.para: A 32-bit value representing the contents of the status register.

briefdescription.para: This macro reads the control register from the HDCP22 RNG.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the HDCP22 RNG core instance.

simplesect.para: A 32-bit value representing the contents of the control register.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the HDCP22 Rng core.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using the HDCP22 Rng core. Initialization of the HDCP22 Rng includes setting up the instance data, and ensuring the hardware is in a quiescent state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp22_Rng core instance.
points to the configuration structure associated with the HDCP22 Rng core core.
is the base address of the device. If address translation is being used, then this parameter must reflect the virtual base address. Otherwise, the physical address should be used.

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE if HDCP22 Rng ID mismatched.

briefdescription.para: This function returns a random number.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XHdcp22_Rng core instance.
points to the buffer that will contain a random number.
is the length of the BufferPtr in bytes. The length must be greater than or equal to RandomLength.
is the requested length of the random number in bytes. The length must be a multiple of 4

briefdescription.para: This function returns a reference to an XHdcp22_Rng_Config structure based on the core id, DeviceId.

detaileddescription.para: The return value will refer to an entry in the device configuration table defined in the xhdcp22_rng_g.c file.

parameterdescription.para: is the unique core ID of the XHDCP22 Rng core for the lookup operation.

simplesect.para: XHdcp22Rng_LookupConfig returns a reference to a config record in the configuration table (in xhdcp22_rng_g.c) corresponding to DeviceId, or NULL if no match is found.

briefdescription.para: This function reads ID of the peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDCP22 Rng core instance.

briefdescription.para: < Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros
This macro enables the HDCP22 RNG peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDCP22 RNG core instance.

briefdescription.para: This macro disables the HDCP22 RNG peripheral.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the HDCP22 RNG core instance.

briefdescription.para: This macro returns the enabled state of HDCP22 RNG.

detaileddescription.para:
for the HDCP22 RNG peripheral.
InstancePtr
is a pointer to the HDCP22 RNG core instance.
TRUE if HDCP22 RNG is enabled, FALSE otherwise.
C-style signature: u32 XHdcp22Rng_IsEnabled(u32 BaseAddress)

briefdescription.para: < Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros
